Appearances:
Plaintiff Dowd Bros. is present. Represented by: Mandy Hao
Attorney Daniel Stern/David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mildred Tsen is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May 18, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)

After the settlement conference, the Judge Pro Tem reports that the Defendant is mentally disabled and does not understand the process.
